name: Morph: Morph V3 Large
description: Morph's high-accuracy apply model for complex code edits. ~4,500 tokens/sec with 98% accuracy for precise code transformations. The model requires the prompt to be in the following format: {instruction} {initial_code} {edit_snippet} Zero Data Retention is enabled for Morph. Learn more about this model in their [documentation](https://docs.morphllm.com/quickstart)
